title: Rootai
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rootai''' was the highest [[Umbaran/Legends|Umbaran]] caste level out of almost one hundred levels. It was made up of a council that ruled [[Umbara/Legends|Umbara]], and its members were considered royalty.<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Alien Species">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-10-31 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''
